# Repository labels

Maintainers: create and apply the GitHub label below through **Issues → Labels**.

| Label | Colour | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `good first issue` | `7057ff` | A bounded, well-described task suitable for a first contribution. It has an expected outcome, likely files or area to change, and a maintainer available to answer questions. |

Do not apply this label merely because an issue is small. Remove it when the scope becomes unclear, someone is actively working on it, or it needs specialist hardware or prior project knowledge.
